title: Videos appear to show the moments U.S. fighter jets were shot down over Kuwait
summary_full: Three U.S. fighter jets involved in the offensive against Iran were shot down mistakenly by Kuwait’s air defenses, the U.S. military’s Central Command said.
summary_public: Three U.S. fighter jets involved in the offensive against Iran were shot down mistakenly by Kuwait’s air defenses, the U.S. military’s Central Command said.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: jets were shot down over Kuwait
